mission.title: jaeger: [deprecation] Phase out grpc-plugin storage (sidecar via hashicorp-plugin)
mission.description: [deprecation] Phase out grpc-plugin storage (sidecar via hashicorp-plugin). This issue affects 5+ users.

steps.title: Identify jaeger upgrade symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your jaeger deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger -n observability --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review jaeger configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger
kubectl get configmap -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger
```
We support two forms of plugins for external storage (https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger/tree/main/plugin/storage/grpc)
  * a sidecar model using hashicorp/go-plugin library
  * a remote storage implementing gRPC Remote Storage API

Even though

steps.title: Apply the fix for [deprecation] Phase out grpc-plugin storage (sidecar via…
steps.description:
## Which problem is this PR solving?
- Part 1 of #4647

## Description of the changes
- Add deprecation notice to CLI flags
- Add log statement with deprecation notice

## How was this change tested?
```
$ SPAN_STORAGE_TYPE=grpc-plugin go run ./cmd/all-in-one help

     
```yaml
$ SPAN_STORAGE_TYPE=grpc-plugin go run ./cmd/all-in-one help

      --grpc-storage-plugin.binary string                         (deprecated, will be removed after 2024-03-01) The location of the plugin binary
      --grpc-storage-plugin.configuration-file string             (deprecated, will be removed after 2024-03-01) A path pointing to the plugin's configuration file, made available to the plugin with the --config arg


$ SPAN_STORAGE_TYPE=grpc-plugin go run ./cmd/all-in-one --grpc-storage-plugin.binary=abcd

2023/09/10 00:39:38 (deprecated, will be removed after 2024-03-01) using sidecar m
```

steps.title: Upgrade jaeger to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade jaeger:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade jaeger jaeger/jaeger --namespace jaeger
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n observability
helm list -n observability
```

steps.title: Confirm [deprecation] Phase out grpc-plugin storage… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger -n observability --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n observability --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:

## Description of the changes
- Add deprecation notice to CLI flags
- Add log statement with deprecation notice

## How was this change tested?

$ SPAN_STORAGE_TYPE=grpc-plugin go run ./cmd/all-in-one help

      --grpc-storage-plugin.binary string                         (deprecated, will be removed after 2024-03-01) The location of the
codeSnippets:

      --grpc-storage-plugin.configuration-file string             (deprecated, will be removed after 2024-03-01) A path pointing to the plugin's configuration file, made available to the plugin with the --config arg


$ SPAN_STORAGE_TYPE=grpc-plugin go run ./cmd/all-in-one --grpc-storage-plugin.binary=abcd

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with jaeger installed or the issue environment reproducible.
